findings.summary: Assumed LFB blocked on UniRef50 download — DB already existed. CYCLE.md blocker was stale.
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: verify CYCLE.md blocker claims by running check command before planning around them

findings.summary: PRS scoring 0/81 due to format spec on string — meta['n_variants']:, crashes on str type
findings.evidence: modal_prs_expanded.py line 322: Cannot specify ',' with 's' — every PGS entry crashed silently
findings.proposed_fix: Coerce numeric PGS metadata fields to int in pgs_core.py parse function

findings.summary: lfb package builds empty wheels — hatchling src-layout + uv produces zero .py files, required 5 image rebuilds to diagnose
findings.evidence: pip show -f lfb listed only dist-info, zero .py files despite successful install
findings.proposed_fix: CLAUDE.md pitfall: verify pip-from-git packages have .py files via pip show -f before wiring into pipeline

findings.summary: Volume has dual result paths (/results/ legacy vs /data/results/ new) — looked in wrong location for LFB output
findings.evidence: modal volume ls /data/results/ showed nothing; /results/esm_lfb/ had the files
findings.proposed_fix: Informational — dual paths are legacy. Not worth fixing.

findings.summary: 4 user status polls during 45-min PRS run because attached Modal runs get backgrounded by Claude Code with no output
findings.evidence: 4 'check status?' messages, 8 tool calls reading output file
findings.proposed_fix: Use --detach + modal app logs --follow for long runs instead of attached runs
